# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-application-bucket
      AccessControl: Private

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref MyS3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Role: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/my-application-role
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${MyS3Bucket}/*"
